steps.title: Find what the student must accomplish
steps.content: The goal requires two things: explaining what a merchant vessel is AND providing examples of merchant vessel types.

steps.title: Identify the choice that fulfills both
steps.content: C integrates the definition (“any ship hired to carry cargo or passengers”) with concrete examples (“like bulk carriers, cruise liners, and oil tankers”). A states the definition without examples; B provides examples without defining the term; D provides neither. That matches choice C — C is correct.
